meaning: n.[化]帕利灵,聚对二甲苯(一种新型热塑性塑料,用于制作极薄薄膜或沉积涂层)
examples: Objective:To determine residual di-paraxylylene in parylene film coated rubber closure by HPLC.
Parylene is a newly developed macromolecular material, first prepared by the Union Carbide Corporation of the U.
The paper focuses on vacuum vapor deposition for making parylene film which is used in many targets. The experiment facility and principle are described too.
